editorial_accuracy.notes: Unchanged. 133 evidence blocks, all sources clean.

information_design.notes: 30 hero images verified. Dark mode image treatment active. Print styles comprehensive.

ui_ux_typography.notes: Fixed header nav overflow (breakpoint md->lg, gap reduced). Mobile hamburger z-index fixed.

code_quality.notes: GA4 event tracking complete: page views, sign-up, login, bookmark, donation, search, share, download, support CTA. Build clean, zero TS errors.

accessibility.notes: Evidence tiers have text + color + icons. Skip link. Focus rings. prefers-reduced-motion. Keyboard nav on share menu.

security.notes: CSP updated: unsafe-inline added to script-src for GA4 inline config. GA analytics domains added to img-src for beacon pixels. Trade-off: slightly weaker script CSP for functional analytics.
